raw_consumer_statement: XXXX issued my American Express account a {$240.00} refund on XX/XX/year> at XXXX am. I called American Express at XXXX on XXXX because the credit had not yet been posted on my account. The AMEX rep informed me that it will take XXXX business days for my account to be credited the {$240.00}. I find this amount of time to correct an online transaction excessive and unreasonable. That is why XXXX referring this matter to the CFPB.
